text:
is a Cadet Corps cadet.

Appearance

Mina has black hair tied into pigtails with light blue bands. She also has dark swirly eyes and typically wears the standard cadet uniform. However, during her free hours, she wears a green jacket.

Personality

Mina is a lively person who enjoys spending time with her friends. She seems fairly social and is rather approachable, making her a good individual that most get along with.
